title: Buttery Indian Toast
description: A simple and delicious breakfast or snack recipe with a hint of Indian spices. This recipe is perfect for a quick morning meal or an evening treat.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Butter the slices of bread on one side.
Sprinkle cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and chili flakes on the unbuttered side of the bread.
Place the bread slices, buttered side down, in the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown.
Flip the bread over and cook for another 2 minutes.
